_note: Starting Sharia-compliant fund universe for the solar-system sleeves (Zero masterclass). Curated reference, NOT a live screen — confirm each against Zoya/Musaffa and check the trading currency on the T212 buy screen before buying. `symbol` = Trading 212 form (LSE = .GB), `yahoo` = price-feed symbol (LSE = .L), `currency` = the line's trading currency (GBP avoids the 0.15% T212 FX fee; USD incurs it). GBP-quoted lines are preferred where they exist.

core.note: the World-Islamic core — GBP-quoted, no FX fee. Preferred over ISDW (USD).

core.note: alt world-Islamic core — GBP-quoted, no FX fee.

core.note: same fund as ISWD but USD-quoted — incurs the 0.15% FX fee. Use ISWD instead.

core.note: halal S&P 500 stand-in; GBP-quoted LSE line (no FX fee).
